name: disco-elysium-css-formatter
description: Browser wizard + CLI that marks up Disco Elysium-style skill checks with the `ao3-adaptive-disco-elysium-workskin` CSS classes, for AO3 fic authors.

scripts.dev: npm --prefix app install && npm --prefix app run dev
scripts.build: npm --prefix app install && npm --prefix app run build
scripts.preview: npm run build && npm --prefix app run preview
